title: MI325X Llama2-70B Offline throughput result
abstract: MLPerf Inference v5.1 reports QuantaGrid D74A-7U with 8x AMD Instinct MI325X reached 34,520.4 samples per second on llama2-70b-99 in the Offline scenario.
finding: QuantaGrid D74A-7U with 8x AMD Instinct MI325X reached 34,520.4 samples/s on llama2-70b-99.

title: MI325X Llama2-70B Server throughput result
abstract: MLPerf Inference v5.1 reports QuantaGrid D74A-7U with 8x AMD Instinct MI325X reached 32,027.6 scheduled samples per second on llama2-70b-99 in the Server scenario.
finding: The same MI325X system reached 32,027.6 scheduled samples/s on llama2-70b-99 in the Server scenario.

title: MI300X Llama2-70B Offline throughput result
abstract: MLPerf Inference v5.1 reports AS-8125GS-TNMR2 with 8x AMD Instinct MI300X reached 27,803.9 samples per second on llama2-70b-99 in the Offline scenario.
finding: The MI300X system reached 27,803.9 samples/s on llama2-70b-99 in the Offline scenario.

title: Offline benchmark results do not directly transfer to Server scenario claims
abstract: MLPerf Inference v5.1 reports separate Offline and Server scenarios; the Server result for the MI325X Llama2-70B system is lower than its Offline samples per second result.
finding: Offline throughput should not be generalized to Server serving workloads because MLPerf reports a separate lower Server result.
